tags.name: Rockport Dive Site
tags.qa_note: Unresolved: site exists in OSM but no independent dive source found confirming site-specific details. Cannot meet 3-source threshold.

tags.name: Basura
tags.qa_note: Depth corrected from 25m to 18m (sources: 3-18m). Rhinopias and wonderpus removed — not site-specific to Basura, attributed to other Anilao muck sites.

Cross placed by Fidel Ramos (confirmed); Pope JPII blessing claim unverified — removed from description. Depth range confirmed 5-30m; maxDepth 19m is conservative, real max closer to 30m at deeper sections.
Difficulty upgraded from Intermediate to Advanced — sources confirm strong currents require Advanced OWD certification. Marine life corrected to site-specific sourced species only.
Wall depth confirmed 5-27m. Site type wall confirmed. Small reef sharks at base not verified at this specific site — removed from description.

Difficulty upgraded from Beginner to Intermediate — sources confirm strong currents during full moon unsuitable for beginners. Depth corrected from 15m to 25m (wall goes to 25-30m per multiple sources).
Depth corrected from 20m to 18m per philippinedives.com (5-18m range). Marine life updated to site-specifically confirmed species.
Wall confirmed drops 5m to 80m+. Depth updated to 30m (recreational limit). Advanced confirmed — Nitrox recommended. Marine life corrected to site-specific sourced species.

Black sand and geothermal features confirmed. Marine life corrected — broadclub cuttlefish and bobbit worms removed as not site-specifically sourced. Confirmed: frogfish, seahorses, wonderpus, ghost pipefish, Coleman shrimp, nudibranchs.
Mandarin fish and bobbit worms claims not independently sourced to this specific site — marked as uncertain in description. Rhinopias mentioned in regional context only.
Current conditions confirmed moderate to strong; beginners not recommended by anilaodiving.com. Marine life description corrected to sourced species.
Blue-ringed octopus confirmed for night dives. Ambon scorpionfish and specific species corrected — only species with site-specific confirmation retained.
Depth 10m confirmed. Ghost pipefish and mantis shrimp not independently sourced to Dead Palm specifically — marked as regional in description.

Site type muck confirmed. Wonderpus and harlequin shrimp confirmed at this site per uwphotographyguide. Rhinopias confirmed at Anilao muck sites including this area. Flamboyant cuttlefish claim retained as regionally confirmed.

tags.name: Bethlehem
tags.qa_note: Location confirmed: entrance to passage between Marikaban and Caban Islands. Depth 3-20m confirmed. Fire urchin shrimps confirmed. Re-audited from single-source to 3-source.

tags.name: Caban Cove
tags.qa_note: Site type corrected from reef to drift — McFadyen confirms current-assisted drift dive. Niger triggerfish (tens of thousands) confirmed. Blue ribbon eel confirmed (1 observed per McFadyen). Giant anglerfish confirmed.

tags.name: Dari Laut
tags.qa_note: WRECK AUDIT: Structure is former floating casino; sank by fire (confirmed by 2 sources). Arson-for-insurance is local speculation only. Depth: upper frame 12-13m, lower frame 25-28m, sandy bottom ~30m. Max depth corrected from 30m to 28m (frame). No verified build date, tonnage, or dimensions found. Wreck conflicts documented in description.

tags.name: Olympic Point
tags.qa_note: Hairy anglerfish confirmed (tiny orange specimen). Spiny devilfish confirmed (2 observed). Mushroom coral pipefish confirmed (in anemones, not on mushroom coral per McFadyen — name is misleading). Ribbon eels (juvenile) confirmed. Site-specific marine life verified.

tags.name: Sun View
tags.qa_note: Pygmy seahorses at 24m on gorgonias confirmed. Octopus and mantis shrimp confirmed. Nudibranchs confirmed. No anemones seen by McFadyen — removed from description.

tags.name: Mainit Bubble Springs
tags.qa_note: Wall ~70m long confirmed by McFadyen. Wall depth 22-30m confirmed. Banded sea snake confirmed. Anglerfish, leaf fish, batfish, turtles confirmed. Hot spring bubbles confirmed geothermal (volcano ~35km away).

tags.name: Mainit Corner
tags.qa_note: Bommie 600m from resort confirmed. Nembrotha nudibranchs confirmed. Harlequin shrimp confirmed. Pygmy seahorse confirmed. Lionfish, sweetlips, boxfish confirmed.

tags.name: Buceo House Reef
tags.qa_note: Three anglerfish on single dive confirmed. Sea moths confirmed. Squat lobsters confirmed. Mantis shrimp confirmed. Site-specific marine life verified against McFadyen primary source.

tags.name: Agahuta
tags.qa_note: Two giant anglerfish confirmed. Thousands of redtooth triggerfish confirmed. Featherstar shrimps confirmed. Hairy squat lobsters confirmed. Marine life retained — all site-specifically sourced.

tags.name: Aphols Point
tags.qa_note: Pygmy seahorse on gorgonia confirmed. Harlequin shrimp confirmed (light-coloured). Funeral jorunna nudibranch confirmed. Orangutan crab in anemone confirmed. Spotted stingrays confirmed. White anglerfish confirmed. Banded sea snake confirmed. All site-specific.
